description: <errors of=> with an empty errors list produces NO DOM (§55.8). A valid "12345" (len 5, all digits) clears code.errors; the <errors of=@signup.code/> anchor renders literally nothing (not a hidden element) — the #err container holds no .scrml-error and empty text.
rationale: §55.8: 'When errors.length == 0, the element produces NO DOM at all (not a hidden element with display:none; literally nothing rendered).' Asserted via a .scrml-error count of 0 and empty container text, plus the empty errors state.
